projects.name: insomnia
projects.description: The open-source, cross-platform API client for GraphQL, REST, WebSockets, SSE and gRPC. With Cloud, Local and Git storage.

llmSummary.oneLiner: Insomnia is an open-source, cross-platform API client supporting GraphQL, REST, WebSockets, SSE, and gRPC with local, Git, and cloud storage.
llmSummary.problemSolved: Developers need a single, powerful tool to design, debug, test, mock, and collaborate on APIs across multiple protocols without switching between different clients or services.
llmSummary.whyNow: With 38,886 stars and a 24-hour delta of +314, Insomnia shows strong, sustained community interest. The acceleration ratio is low (1), indicating steady organic growth rather than a sudden spike. This consistent attention signals a reliable, widely adopted tool in the API ecosystem.
llmSummary.whatChanged: No single obvious trigger — the project appears to be sustaining organic growth. Recent commits and a release within 30 days suggest ongoing maintenance and feature improvements, but no specific event (e.g., major version launch or viral post) is evident from the metadata.
llmSummary.whyTrending: Insomnia is a mature, feature-rich alternative to Postman, with strong support for modern protocols (GraphQL, gRPC, SSE) and flexible storage options (local, Git, cloud). Its open-source nature and active community drive continuous adoption.
llmSummary.developerTakeaway: Insomnia is a reliable, cross-platform API client that covers the full API lifecycle. Developers should consider it for both personal projects and team collaboration, especially if they need offline or Git-backed storage.
llmSummary.developerInsight: For AI developers, Insomnia's support for GraphQL and gRPC aligns with modern API patterns used in AI services. Its plugin ecosystem and CLI enable integration into CI/CD pipelines, making it a practical choice for testing AI model endpoints.
llmSummary.targetUsers: API developers, backend engineers, frontend developers, QA engineers, and teams needing collaborative API design, testing, and documentation.
llmSummary.riskNotes: The project requires an account for most features (though local scratch pad is account-free), which may concern privacy-focused users. Competition from Postman and other clients is strong, but Insomnia's open-source model is a differentiator.

projects.name: NextChat
projects.description: ✨ Light and Fast AI Assistant. Support: Web | iOS | MacOS | Android |  Linux | Windows

llmSummary.oneLiner: NextChat is a lightweight, cross-platform AI chat client that supports multiple LLMs (Claude, GPT-4, Gemini, DeepSeek) with one-click deployment and a privacy-first local-storage design.
llmSummary.problemSolved: It provides a unified, fast, and privacy-respecting interface for interacting with various AI models, eliminating the need to switch between different chat UIs or expose API keys to third-party services.
llmSummary.whyNow: With 88,131 stars and a 24h star delta of 22, the project shows sustained high interest. The acceleration ratio of 2.9 (high) indicates a sudden breakout in attention, likely driven by recent feature additions like MCP support, real-time chat, and the iOS app release. The 7-day average star delta of 7.8 confirms consistent growth, but the acceleration signals a recent spike.
llmSummary.whatChanged: Recent commits and README updates highlight the addition of MCP (Model Context Protocol) support, real-time chat, and the launch of the iOS app. These features expand the project's utility and appeal, likely triggering the breakout.
llmSummary.whyTrending: NextChat combines ease of deployment (one-click Vercel), broad model support, and a polished cross-platform desktop app, making it a go-to tool for developers and power users who want a self-hosted, customizable AI assistant.
llmSummary.developerTakeaway: This project demonstrates the demand for lightweight, multi-model chat UIs that prioritize privacy and local storage. Developers can learn from its architecture (Next.js + Tauri) and plugin system to build similar tools.
llmSummary.developerInsight: The rapid adoption of NextChat signals a shift toward unified, self-hosted AI interfaces that reduce dependency on single providers. The MCP support hints at a future where AI tools interoperate via standardized protocols, opening opportunities for plugin ecosystems.
llmSummary.targetUsers: Developers, AI enthusiasts, and power users who want a fast, private, and customizable chat interface for multiple LLMs, including those running local models.
llmSummary.riskNotes: The project relies on third-party API keys and services; users must manage their own keys. The rapid pace of features may introduce instability. No recent release tag could indicate a focus on bleeding-edge commits over stable releases.

projects.name: Front-End-Checklist
projects.description: 🗂 The essential checklist for modern web development, for humans and AI agents

llmSummary.oneLiner: A comprehensive, MCP-powered front-end quality checklist with 385 rules across 11 categories, designed for both human developers and AI agents.
llmSummary.problemSolved: Provides a structured, actionable front-end best practices checklist that can be used interactively on the web, via MCP tools for AI agents, or as a static README, ensuring consistent code quality and compliance across projects.
llmSummary.whyNow: With 72,971 stars, a 24-hour star delta of 14, and a high acceleration of 2.2, this project is experiencing a sudden breakout in attention. The recent release and active commits (within 7 days) indicate ongoing development, making it a timely resource for developers adopting AI-assisted workflows.
llmSummary.whatChanged: The project recently added MCP server support and a skills system, enabling AI agents to directly use the checklist for code review and audits. This shift from a static checklist to an interactive, agent-compatible tool likely drove the sudden spike in interest.
llmSummary.whyTrending: It bridges the gap between traditional front-end best practices and modern AI agent workflows, offering a practical, ready-to-use rule corpus that agents can query via MCP. This dual human/AI focus is highly relevant as developers seek to integrate AI into their development processes.
llmSummary.developerTakeaway: Front-End Checklist is a mature, well-structured resource that can be immediately used to enforce front-end quality in both manual reviews and automated AI agent audits. Its MCP integration makes it a powerful tool for teams adopting AI-assisted development.
llmSummary.developerInsight: This signals a growing trend of turning static documentation into machine-consumable, agent-friendly formats. For AI developers, it demonstrates how to package domain knowledge (e.g., front-end rules) as MCP tools, enabling agents to perform structured, reliable code reviews without hallucination.
llmSummary.targetUsers: Front-end developers, web developers, QA engineers, and AI/ML engineers building agent-based code review or auditing tools.
llmSummary.riskNotes: The checklist is opinionated and may not cover all edge cases or specific framework nuances. Over-reliance on automated checks could miss context-specific issues. The MCP server is hosted externally, so availability and latency depend on the provider.

projects.name: headroom
projects.description: Compress tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks before they reach the LLM. 60-95% fewer tokens, same answers. Library, proxy, MCP server.

llmSummary.oneLiner: Headroom compresses AI agent inputs (tool outputs, logs, RAG chunks) by 60–95% before they reach the LLM, preserving answer quality while slashing token costs.
llmSummary.problemSolved: LLM context windows fill up quickly with verbose tool outputs, logs, and RAG results, driving up costs and limiting context depth. Headroom reduces token usage without sacrificing accuracy, and works as a library, proxy, MCP server, or agent wrapper.
llmSummary.whyNow: Headroom has exploded to 39,160 stars with a 24-hour delta of 4,687 and a 7-day average of 4,952.5 stars per day. The acceleration ratio of 1.8 indicates sustained high velocity, not a sudden spike. This is a project that has captured massive developer attention for solving a universal pain point in AI agent workflows.
llmSummary.whatChanged: No single obvious trigger — the project appears to be sustaining organic growth. The recent release and continuous commits suggest active development, but the star growth is likely driven by word-of-mouth and the universal need for token optimization in AI agents.
llmSummary.whyTrending: Token compression is a critical need for anyone using LLMs in production. Headroom offers a practical, measurable solution (60–95% reduction) with multiple integration modes, making it immediately useful for developers, AI agents, and enterprises. The combination of a clear value proposition, open-source availability, and active community has fueled its rapid rise.
llmSummary.developerTakeaway: Headroom is a must-evaluate tool for any developer building AI agents or LLM-powered applications. It can dramatically reduce costs and improve context handling with minimal integration effort.
llmSummary.developerInsight: This signals a shift toward treating token efficiency as a first-class concern in AI agent architecture. Developers should expect token optimization to become a standard layer in the stack, similar to how caching and compression are standard in web infrastructure.
llmSummary.targetUsers: AI agent developers, LLM application builders, RAG pipeline engineers, and anyone using Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, or similar tools who wants to reduce token consumption without changing their workflow.
llmSummary.riskNotes: The project is very new and rapidly evolving; API stability is not guaranteed. Accuracy preservation claims are based on limited benchmarks and may not hold for all use cases. The compression algorithms may introduce latency or edge-case failures. Dependency on external models (Kompress-v2-base) adds complexity.

projects.name: Agent-Reach
projects.description: Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees.

llmSummary.oneLiner: Agent Reach is a CLI tool that gives AI agents zero-config access to read and search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, Xiaohongshu, and more — all free, no API fees.
llmSummary.problemSolved: AI agents lack native ability to read web content from platforms that require authentication, paid APIs, or complex scraping setups. Agent Reach solves this by providing a unified installer and channel router that selects the best free backend for each platform, handles authentication, and lets agents access content via simple commands.
llmSummary.whyNow: The repo exploded from 31,787 stars with a 24h delta of +2,809 and a 7-day delta of +7,284. The acceleration ratio is 3.3 (high), indicating a sudden breakout. This is a massive spike in attention, likely driven by viral sharing in AI developer communities.
llmSummary.whatChanged: No single obvious trigger — the project appears to be sustaining organic growth. The README is comprehensive and was recently updated (pushed 2026-06-16). The project has a recent release and active commits within 7 days. The breakout may be fueled by word-of-mouth among Claude Code and Cursor users who need free web access for their agents.
llmSummary.whyTrending: It solves a universal pain point for AI agent users: getting content from walled-garden platforms without paying for APIs or writing custom scrapers. The 'one CLI, zero API fees' pitch is compelling, and the project's design (multi-backend routing, self-diagnosis, easy install) reduces friction. The Chinese-language README also taps into a large developer base in China.
llmSummary.developerTakeaway: For AI agent builders, this is a ready-made capability layer that can be integrated into any agent that runs shell commands. It eliminates the need to build and maintain scrapers for multiple platforms. Developers can use it to give their agents web-reading abilities in minutes.
llmSummary.developerInsight: This signals a shift toward 'capability layers' that abstract away the complexity of platform-specific access. Instead of each agent reinventing the wheel for web scraping, a shared open-source layer can handle authentication, backend selection, and fallback routing. This pattern may become standard for agent infrastructure.
llmSummary.targetUsers: AI agent developers and power users who use Claude Code, Cursor, OpenClaw, Windsurf, or similar tools and need their agents to read content from Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, Xiaohongshu, and other platforms without paying for APIs.
llmSummary.riskNotes: The project relies on third-party tools and browser cookies for some platforms (Twitter, Reddit, Xiaohongshu), which carries account ban risk if detected. Some backends may break when platforms update their anti-scraping measures. The project's long-term maintenance depends on the author's continued engagement.

projects.name: kilocode
projects.description: Kilo is the all-in-one agentic engineering platform. Build, ship, and iterate faster with the most popular open source coding agent.

llmSummary.oneLiner: Kilo Code is an open-source AI coding agent that integrates with VS Code, JetBrains, and CLI, offering 500+ models with zero markup and autonomous CI/CD capabilities.
llmSummary.problemSolved: Developers need a unified, cost-transparent AI coding assistant that works across multiple IDEs and the terminal, supports model switching mid-task, and can operate autonomously in CI/CD pipelines without vendor lock-in or per-seat pricing.
llmSummary.whyNow: The repo gained 1,695 stars in the last 24 hours and 2,879 in the last 7 days, with a 24h delta of 1,047 and a three-day average of 372.7 stars/day. The acceleration ratio of 4.5 (high) signals a sudden breakout, not gradual growth. Total stars are 22,903, indicating massive attention momentum. This is a clear breakout event worth monitoring.
llmSummary.whatChanged: No single obvious trigger — the project appears to be sustaining organic growth. However, the recent release (within 30 days) and active commits (within 7 days) suggest ongoing feature improvements. The README mentions a fork of OpenCode, which may have contributed to initial traction, but the current breakout is likely driven by community adoption and word-of-mouth.
llmSummary.whyTrending: Kilo Code offers a compelling value proposition: open-source, multi-IDE support, 500+ models at cost, and autonomous mode for CI/CD. The combination of flexibility, zero markup, and no API key requirement lowers the barrier to entry, attracting developers frustrated with proprietary AI coding tools.
llmSummary.developerTakeaway: Kilo Code is a strong alternative to GitHub Copilot and Cursor, especially for teams that want model choice, cost transparency, and the ability to run agents in CI/CD. Its sudden breakout suggests it's filling a real gap in the AI coding agent space.
llmSummary.developerInsight: This signals a shift toward open-source, model-agnostic coding agents that prioritize user control and cost efficiency. Developers should evaluate Kilo Code for its autonomous CI/CD capabilities and multi-IDE support, which could reduce reliance on single-vendor solutions.
llmSummary.targetUsers: Software developers and engineering teams using VS Code, JetBrains, or CLI who want an AI coding agent with model flexibility, cost transparency, and autonomous CI/CD integration.
llmSummary.riskNotes: The project is a fork of OpenCode, which may raise questions about long-term maintenance and differentiation. With 804 open issues, community management and response times will be critical. The sudden breakout could attract scrutiny and competition from established players.

projects.name: ai-engineering-from-scratch
projects.description: Learn it. Build it. Ship it for others.

llmSummary.oneLiner: A massive, free, open-source curriculum (503 lessons, 20 phases) that teaches AI engineering from math foundations to production agents, with every lesson producing a reusable artifact.
llmSummary.problemSolved: Most AI learning resources are scattered, shallow, or API-focused. This curriculum provides a structured, end-to-end path that builds deep understanding by implementing algorithms from scratch before using frameworks, and ensures every lesson produces a practical, shippable artifact.
llmSummary.whyNow: With 32,318 stars, a 7-day average delta of 405 stars/day, and a 24-hour delta of 605 stars, this repo is experiencing sustained, high-velocity growth. The acceleration ratio of 1.9 indicates strong and consistent momentum, not a sudden spike. The project has attracted over 150,000 readers and 241,000 page views in the last 30 days, signaling broad community adoption.
llmSummary.whatChanged: No single obvious trigger — the project appears to be sustaining organic growth. The README was recently updated (pushed June 14, 2026) and the curriculum continues to expand, but no major release or external event is evident.
llmSummary.whyTrending: The curriculum fills a clear gap: it offers a free, comprehensive, hands-on path from math to production agents, with a unique 'build it, use it, ship it' philosophy. The inclusion of multiple languages (Python, TypeScript, Rust, Julia) and the focus on producing reusable artifacts (prompts, skills, agents, MCP servers) resonates with developers who want deep understanding and practical output.
llmSummary.developerTakeaway: This is a high-quality, structured resource for anyone serious about AI engineering. It's worth cloning and exploring, especially for developers who want to move beyond API wrappers and understand the underlying mechanics.
llmSummary.developerInsight: The project signals a growing demand for deep, foundational AI education that prioritizes understanding over speed. Developers are increasingly seeking resources that teach them to build from scratch, not just consume frameworks. The curriculum's emphasis on shipping artifacts also reflects a shift toward practical, portfolio-building learning.
llmSummary.targetUsers: Developers and engineers who want to learn AI engineering from the ground up, from math to production. Suitable for beginners with coding experience and experienced practitioners looking to fill gaps in their understanding.
llmSummary.riskNotes: The curriculum is massive (503 lessons, ~320 hours) and may be overwhelming. Some lessons may be incomplete or in progress. The project is maintained by a single creator, so long-term sustainability depends on continued contributions and community support.

The combination of a clear value proposition, open-source availability, and active community has fueled its rapid rise.
llmSummary.developerTakeaway: Headroom is a must-evaluate tool for any developer building AI agents or LLM-powered applications. It can dramatically reduce costs and improve context handling with minimal integration effort.
llmSummary.developerInsight: This signals a shift toward treating token efficiency as a first-class concern in AI agent architecture. Developers should expect token optimization to become a standard layer in the stack, similar to how caching and compression are standard in web infrastructure.
llmSummary.targetUsers: AI agent developers, LLM application builders, RAG pipeline engineers, and anyone using Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, or similar tools who wants to reduce token consumption without changing their workflow.
llmSummary.riskNotes: The project is very new and rapidly evolving; API stability is not guaranteed. Accuracy preservation claims are based on limited benchmarks and may not hold for all use cases. The compression algorithms may introduce latency or edge-case failures. Dependency on external models (Kompress-v2-base) adds complexity.

watchlistMovements.name: Agent-Reach
watchlistMovements.description: Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees.

llmSummary.oneLiner: Agent Reach is a CLI tool that gives AI agents zero-config access to read and search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, Xiaohongshu, and more — all free, no API fees.
llmSummary.problemSolved: AI agents lack native ability to read web content from platforms that require authentication, paid APIs, or complex scraping setups. Agent Reach solves this by providing a unified installer and channel router that selects the best free backend for each platform, handles authentication, and lets agents access content via simple commands.
llmSummary.whyNow: The repo exploded from 31,787 stars with a 24h delta of +2,809 and a 7-day delta of +7,284. The acceleration ratio is 3.3 (high), indicating a sudden breakout. This is a massive spike in attention, likely driven by viral sharing in AI developer communities.
llmSummary.whatChanged: No single obvious trigger — the project appears to be sustaining organic growth. The README is comprehensive and was recently updated (pushed 2026-06-16). The project has a recent release and active commits within 7 days. The breakout may be fueled by word-of-mouth among Claude Code and Cursor users who need free web access for their agents.
llmSummary.whyTrending: It solves a universal pain point for AI agent users: getting content from walled-garden platforms without paying for APIs or writing custom scrapers. The 'one CLI, zero API fees' pitch is compelling, and the project's design (multi-backend routing, self-diagnosis, easy install) reduces friction. The Chinese-language README also taps into a large developer base in China.
llmSummary.developerTakeaway: For AI agent builders, this is a ready-made capability layer that can be integrated into any agent that runs shell commands. It eliminates the need to build and maintain scrapers for multiple platforms. Developers can use it to give their agents web-reading abilities in minutes.
llmSummary.developerInsight: This signals a shift toward 'capability layers' that abstract away the complexity of platform-specific access. Instead of each agent reinventing the wheel for web scraping, a shared open-source layer can handle authentication, backend selection, and fallback routing. This pattern may become standard for agent infrastructure.
llmSummary.targetUsers: AI agent developers and power users who use Claude Code, Cursor, OpenClaw, Windsurf, or similar tools and need their agents to read content from Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, Xiaohongshu, and other platforms without paying for APIs.
llmSummary.riskNotes: The project relies on third-party tools and browser cookies for some platforms (Twitter, Reddit, Xiaohongshu), which carries account ban risk if detected. Some backends may break when platforms update their anti-scraping measures. The project's long-term maintenance depends on the author's continued engagement.

llmSummary.oneLiner: Kilo Code is an open-source AI coding agent that integrates with VS Code, JetBrains, and CLI, offering 500+ models with zero markup and autonomous CI/CD capabilities.
llmSummary.problemSolved: Developers need a unified, cost-transparent AI coding assistant that works across multiple IDEs and the terminal, supports model switching mid-task, and can operate autonomously in CI/CD pipelines without vendor lock-in or per-seat pricing.
llmSummary.whyNow: The repo gained 1,695 stars in the last 24 hours and 2,879 in the last 7 days, with a 24h delta of 1,047 and a three-day average of 372.7 stars/day. The acceleration ratio of 4.5 (high) signals a sudden breakout, not gradual growth. Total stars are 22,903, indicating massive attention momentum. This is a clear breakout event worth monitoring.
llmSummary.whatChanged: No single obvious trigger — the project appears to be sustaining organic growth. However, the recent release (within 30 days) and active commits (within 7 days) suggest ongoing feature improvements. The README mentions a fork of OpenCode, which may have contributed to initial traction, but the current breakout is likely driven by community adoption and word-of-mouth.
llmSummary.whyTrending: Kilo Code offers a compelling value proposition: open-source, multi-IDE support, 500+ models at cost, and autonomous mode for CI/CD. The combination of flexibility, zero markup, and no API key requirement lowers the barrier to entry, attracting developers frustrated with proprietary AI coding tools.
llmSummary.developerTakeaway: Kilo Code is a strong alternative to GitHub Copilot and Cursor, especially for teams that want model choice, cost transparency, and the ability to run agents in CI/CD. Its sudden breakout suggests it's filling a real gap in the AI coding agent space.
llmSummary.developerInsight: This signals a shift toward open-source, model-agnostic coding agents that prioritize user control and cost efficiency. Developers should evaluate Kilo Code for its autonomous CI/CD capabilities and multi-IDE support, which could reduce reliance on single-vendor solutions.
llmSummary.targetUsers: Software developers and engineering teams using VS Code, JetBrains, or CLI who want an AI coding agent with model flexibility, cost transparency, and autonomous CI/CD integration.
llmSummary.riskNotes: The project is a fork of OpenCode, which may raise questions about long-term maintenance and differentiation. With 804 open issues, community management and response times will be critical. The sudden breakout could attract scrutiny and competition from established players.

watchlistMovements.name: ai-engineering-from-scratch
watchlistMovements.description: Learn it. Build it. Ship it for others.

llmSummary.oneLiner: A massive, free, open-source curriculum (503 lessons, 20 phases) that teaches AI engineering from math foundations to production agents, with every lesson producing a reusable artifact.
llmSummary.problemSolved: Most AI learning resources are scattered, shallow, or API-focused. This curriculum provides a structured, end-to-end path that builds deep understanding by implementing algorithms from scratch before using frameworks, and ensures every lesson produces a practical, shippable artifact.
llmSummary.whyNow: With 32,318 stars, a 7-day average delta of 405 stars/day, and a 24-hour delta of 605 stars, this repo is experiencing sustained, high-velocity growth. The acceleration ratio of 1.9 indicates strong and consistent momentum, not a sudden spike. The project has attracted over 150,000 readers and 241,000 page views in the last 30 days, signaling broad community adoption.
llmSummary.whatChanged: No single obvious trigger — the project appears to be sustaining organic growth. The README was recently updated (pushed June 14, 2026) and the curriculum continues to expand, but no major release or external event is evident.
llmSummary.whyTrending: The curriculum fills a clear gap: it offers a free, comprehensive, hands-on path from math to production agents, with a unique 'build it, use it, ship it' philosophy. The inclusion of multiple languages (Python, TypeScript, Rust, Julia) and the focus on producing reusable artifacts (prompts, skills, agents, MCP servers) resonates with developers who want deep understanding and practical output.
llmSummary.developerTakeaway: This is a high-quality, structured resource for anyone serious about AI engineering. It's worth cloning and exploring, especially for developers who want to move beyond API wrappers and understand the underlying mechanics.
llmSummary.developerInsight: The project signals a growing demand for deep, foundational AI education that prioritizes understanding over speed. Developers are increasingly seeking resources that teach them to build from scratch, not just consume frameworks. The curriculum's emphasis on shipping artifacts also reflects a shift toward practical, portfolio-building learning.
llmSummary.targetUsers: Developers and engineers who want to learn AI engineering from the ground up, from math to production. Suitable for beginners with coding experience and experienced practitioners looking to fill gaps in their understanding.
llmSummary.riskNotes: The curriculum is massive (503 lessons, ~320 hours) and may be overwhelming. Some lessons may be incomplete or in progress. The project is maintained by a single creator, so long-term sustainability depends on continued contributions and community support.

aihotHighlights.title: NVIDIA Research 发布 SpatialClaw：免训练空间推理框架
aihotHighlights.summary: NVIDIA Research 发布 SpatialClaw，一个免训练的空间推理框架。它通过将代码作为动作接口，让智能体调用感知工具（Depth Anything 3、SAM 3）并自由组合输出，解决视觉语言模型在 3D 空间判断上的弱点。在 20 项基准测试中平均准确率达 59.9%，比近期智能体 SpaceTools 高 11.2 个百分点，比无工具基线高 6.5 点，比结构化工具调用高 3.2 点。框架无需重新训练，同一提示词和工具集可跨所有基准和骨干网络运行，支持 Qwen3.5/3.6 及 Gemma4 等 26B 至 397B 参数的模型。

aihotHighlights.title: JAWBONE Act：一项打击政府为压制合法网络言论而施压的新法案
aihotHighlights.summary: 上周，参议员Ted Cruz和Ron Wyden提出两党法案JAWBONE Act，为受政府胁迫的广播商、互动计算机服务商及AI提供商创建针对政府官员的联邦诉讼权，并建立政府与中间方就用户表达问题沟通的透明度体系。法案旨在应对政府施压私营公司审查受第一修正案保护的言论。EFF支持该法案，并举证：2025年6月联邦高官威胁起诉ICEBlock创建者，同年10月司法部长要求苹果下架该应用。EFF还提起信息自由诉讼，要求披露政府与苹果、谷歌、Meta的沟通记录。

aihotHighlights.title: OpenRouter vs Portkey：你的团队该选哪个LLM网关？
aihotHighlights.summary: OpenRouter是托管路由网络，买credits后通过一个API路由至70+供应商，自动故障转移，无需自有密钥；覆盖300+模型（含20+免费），按用量收费（零加成+5.5%平台费，首100万免费），支持零数据保留和欧盟路由。Portkey是AI控制平面（2026年被Palo Alto收购），置于用户密钥之上，增加治理、提示管理、护栏和可观测性；提供1600+ LLM统一API，按日志计费（Developer免费，Production $49/月），支持HIPAA、SSO、私有部署。两者均可组合使用。

aihotHighlights.title: baoyu-design Skill迭代：修复导出样式与渐变丢失问题，支持AI配图导出PPTX
aihotHighlights.summary: 宝玉分享 baoyu-design Skill 的迭代过程：用户测试发现导出问题（样式表未铺满整页、渐变色丢失），他在本地复现后让 Agent 分析原因、给出解决方案并添加测试覆盖，修复后效果改善。该 Skill 可在制作 PPT、动画视频或网站时调用 AI 生图配图，支持 Codex 内置画图或配合 baoyu-image-gen Skill 调用 Codex CLI 画图，并能连同图片一起导出为 PPTX，在 PowerPoint/Keynote 中二次编辑。迭代循环：自己用 → 发现问题 → 让 Agent 分析 → 出方案 → 确认 → 更新 Skill。

aihotHighlights.title: AI中心的数据黑洞
aihotHighlights.summary: 智能的一种定义是样本效率，但近年AI进步主要靠扩充数据分布和增加算力。强化学习本质是合成数据生成--投入大量算力通过验证器筛选"好"数据，再训练模型预测正确输出。这一过程需要每个领域和技能的海量人类专家示例，数据行业年收入已达数十亿美元。近日Epoch报告，开源模型仅落后前沿闭源模型4个月，原因在于数据可从公开API蒸馏，而超参数等不易复制。人类一生接触约2亿token，前沿模型训练在数十到数百T token之间，相差近百万倍--机器人、自动驾驶等领域同样存在巨大效率差距。

aihotHighlights.title: AlphaFold 负责人 John Jumper 离职 Google DeepMind，加入 Anthropic
aihotHighlights.summary: AlphaFold 团队负责人 John Jumper 宣布，在 Google DeepMind 工作近 9 年后决定离职，将加入 Anthropic（先休整一段时间）。DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis 表示，过去 9 年与 Jumper 的非凡合作改变了世界，AlphaFold 展示了 AI 在科学与医学领域的巨大潜力，并为 AI 造福人类指明了方向。Jumper 回忆，Hassabis 在他博士毕业仅 6 个月后就大胆让他领导 AlphaFold 团队，感谢团队教会他如何做伟大的科学。

aihotHighlights.title: OpenRouter vs LiteLLM：如何选择 LLM 网关
aihotHighlights.summary: OpenRouter 是托管在 Cloudflare 边缘的 LLM 网关，无需管理基础设施，收取 5.5% 平台费（前 100 万次请求免费），支持 70+ 提供商和自动故障转移。LiteLLM 是自部署代理（Docker/PostgreSQL/Redis），数据不离开内网，免费开源，但需承担基础设施成本（生产部署约数百美元/月）。当模型月支出超过约 $3，600（基础设施 $200/月）或 $9，100（基础设施 $500/月）时自托管更划算。LiteLLM 提供六种路由策略和自定义 Python 路由；OpenRouter 具备 SOC 2、GDPR 认证和零数据保留选项。两者可串联使用。

aihotHighlights.title: 禁止开源AI将是一个错误
aihotHighlights.summary: 近期行政命令、国会提案及对Anthropic最先进模型的境外访问限制，可能开启新一轮AI监管。开源软件已支撑全球90%以上软件并创造8万亿美元经济价值，在教育、创新和竞争三方面持续赋能。Anthropic与OpenAI的封闭模型加剧市场集中，开源（尤其开放权重）是初创公司、教育机构和企业获得替代方案的唯一平衡力量。开源透明性使其更安全，更多工程师可剔除不需要的模型行为或修复漏洞。以中国竞争为由监管开源将适得其反，美国初创公司正依赖包括中国在内的开源模型提升效率。

aihotHighlights.title: Humanize PPT v0.9：为演讲而生的开源PPT Skill
aihotHighlights.summary: Humanize PPT v0.9 是一款专为演讲场景设计的PPT Skill，核心通过AST（Audience， State， Transfer）逻辑重新编排大纲，将页面渲染外包给下游Skill。渲染前先输出4张真实预览页，并将图片、视频素材的占位与生成prompt写入大纲。新增质检环节自动修复常见渲染问题，并支持演讲模式：按S键在独立窗口显示演讲稿备注，按ESC键打开全局索引快速跳页。项目已开源至github.com/LearnPrompt/humanize-ppt，由卡尔 & yc星辰开发。

aihotHighlights.title: 我们在 Elasticsearch 上构建了一个持久化代理内存层，其召回率为0.89
aihotHighlights.summary: Agent Builder 正式上市（GA）。基于 Elasticsearch 的持久化内存层将记忆分为情景、语义、程序三类，分别存入独立索引，各设不同写速率与过期规则。召回采用 BM25 与 Jina v5 稠密向量的 RRF 融合，再经交叉编码器重排序。在 168 道 QA 题评估中，R@10 平均 0.89，零跨租户泄漏。该层可通过支持 MCP 协议的客户端访问，不绑定特定运行时，已开源至 GitHub。

aihotHighlights.title: 阿里开源向量数据库Zvec，UCSD黄碧薇教授提出因果AI第四代范式
aihotHighlights.summary: 阿里开源内部向量数据库Zvec，pip install zvec免费使用，对标Pinecone每月70美元能力。支持十亿向量毫秒级检索，无需单独起服务，全平台兼容；v0.5.0新增原生全文混合搜索。UCSD黄碧薇教授（causal-learn作者）提出AI四代范式：相关性小模型→因果小模型→相关性大模型（LLM）→因果大模型，认为当前正站在第四代门口。其创立的Aether AI完成首轮融资，致力于从视频中自动抽取物理规律，探索下一代因果AI范式。

items.title: JAWBONE Act：一项打击政府为压制合法网络言论而施压的新法案
items.summary: 上周，参议员Ted Cruz和Ron Wyden提出两党法案JAWBONE Act，为受政府胁迫的广播商、互动计算机服务商及AI提供商创建针对政府官员的联邦诉讼权，并建立政府与中间方就用户表达问题沟通的透明度体系。法案旨在应对政府施压私营公司审查受第一修正案保护的言论。EFF支持该法案，并举证：2025年6月联邦高官威胁起诉ICEBlock创建者，同年10月司法部长要求苹果下架该应用。EFF还提起信息自由诉讼，要求披露政府与苹果、谷歌、Meta的沟通记录。

items.title: Cloudflare 为 AI 智能体推出临时账户
items.summary: Cloudflare 在 Workers 上推出临时账户（Temporary Accounts），允许 AI 智能体直接运行 `wrangler deploy --temporary`，在数秒内获取一个可用的实时 Worker，无需绕开面向人类设计的部署流程。该功能旨在降低智能体部署门槛。

items.title: 微软双向转售GPT与DeepSeek成全球最大AI中间商
items.description: 彭博社报道，微软已成为全球最大AI模型中转站，既将ChatGPT卖给中国企业，也反向将DeepSeek模型卖给西方客户。报道称微软正在测试DeepSeek-R1和DeepSeek-V4，计划向西方客户提供这些中国模型。这一模式构建起跨中美AI模型的双向贸易网络。

items.title: NVIDIA Research 发布 SpatialClaw：免训练空间推理框架
items.description: NVIDIA Research 发布 SpatialClaw，一个免训练的空间推理框架。它通过将代码作为动作接口，让智能体调用感知工具（Depth Anything 3、SAM 3）并自由组合输出，解决视觉语言模型在 3D 空间判断上的弱点。在 20 项基准测试中平均准确率达 59.9%，比近期智能体 SpaceTools 高 11.2 个百分点，比无工具基线高 6.5 点，比结构化工具调用高 3.2 点。框架无需重新训练，同一提示词和工具集可跨所有基准和骨干网络运行，支持 Qwen3.5/3.6 及 Gemma4 等 26B 至 397B 参数的模型。

items.title: OpenRouter vs Portkey：你的团队该选哪个LLM网关？
items.description: OpenRouter是托管路由网络，买credits后通过一个API路由至70+供应商，自动故障转移，无需自有密钥；覆盖300+模型（含20+免费），按用量收费（零加成+5.5%平台费，首100万免费），支持零数据保留和欧盟路由。Portkey是AI控制平面（2026年被Palo Alto收购），置于用户密钥之上，增加治理、提示管理、护栏和可观测性；提供1600+ LLM统一API，按日志计费（Developer免费，Production $49/月），支持HIPAA、SSO、私有部署。两者均可组合使用。

items.title: baoyu-design Skill迭代：修复导出样式与渐变丢失问题，支持AI配图导出PPTX
items.description: 宝玉分享 baoyu-design Skill 的迭代过程：用户测试发现导出问题（样式表未铺满整页、渐变色丢失），他在本地复现后让 Agent 分析原因、给出解决方案并添加测试覆盖，修复后效果改善。该 Skill 可在制作 PPT、动画视频或网站时调用 AI 生图配图，支持 Codex 内置画图或配合 baoyu-image-gen Skill 调用 Codex CLI 画图，并能连同图片一起导出为 PPTX，在 PowerPoint/Keynote 中二次编辑。迭代循环：自己用 → 发现问题 → 让 Agent 分析 → 出方案 → 确认 → 更新 Skill。

items.title: AI中心的数据黑洞
items.description: 智能的一种定义是样本效率，但近年AI进步主要靠扩充数据分布和增加算力。强化学习本质是合成数据生成--投入大量算力通过验证器筛选"好"数据，再训练模型预测正确输出。这一过程需要每个领域和技能的海量人类专家示例，数据行业年收入已达数十亿美元。近日Epoch报告，开源模型仅落后前沿闭源模型4个月，原因在于数据可从公开API蒸馏，而超参数等不易复制。人类一生接触约2亿token，前沿模型训练在数十到数百T token之间，相差近百万倍--机器人、自动驾驶等领域同样存在巨大效率差距。

items.title: AlphaFold 负责人 John Jumper 离职 Google DeepMind，加入 Anthropic
items.description: AlphaFold 团队负责人 John Jumper 宣布，在 Google DeepMind 工作近 9 年后决定离职，将加入 Anthropic（先休整一段时间）。DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis 表示，过去 9 年与 Jumper 的非凡合作改变了世界，AlphaFold 展示了 AI 在科学与医学领域的巨大潜力，并为 AI 造福人类指明了方向。Jumper 回忆，Hassabis 在他博士毕业仅 6 个月后就大胆让他领导 AlphaFold 团队，感谢团队教会他如何做伟大的科学。

items.description: 彭博社报道，微软已成为全球最大AI模型中转站，既将ChatGPT卖给中国企业，也反向将DeepSeek模型卖给西方客户。报道称微软正在测试DeepSeek-R1和DeepSeek-V4，计划向西方客户提供这些中国模型。这一模式构建起跨中美AI模型的双向贸易网络。

items.title: NVIDIA Research 发布 SpatialClaw：免训练空间推理框架
items.description: NVIDIA Research 发布 SpatialClaw，一个免训练的空间推理框架。它通过将代码作为动作接口，让智能体调用感知工具（Depth Anything 3、SAM 3）并自由组合输出，解决视觉语言模型在 3D 空间判断上的弱点。在 20 项基准测试中平均准确率达 59.9%，比近期智能体 SpaceTools 高 11.2 个百分点，比无工具基线高 6.5 点，比结构化工具调用高 3.2 点。框架无需重新训练，同一提示词和工具集可跨所有基准和骨干网络运行，支持 Qwen3.5/3.6 及 Gemma4 等 26B 至 397B 参数的模型。

trendEntities.title: JAWBONE Act：一项打击政府为压制合法网络言论而施压的新法案
normalizedKeys: title:jawbone act 一项打击政府为压制合法网络言论而施压的新法案
title:a new bill takes aim at government pressure to silence lawful online speech

items.title: JAWBONE Act：一项打击政府为压制合法网络言论而施压的新法案
items.summary: 上周，参议员Ted Cruz和Ron Wyden提出两党法案JAWBONE Act，为受政府胁迫的广播商、互动计算机服务商及AI提供商创建针对政府官员的联邦诉讼权，并建立政府与中间方就用户表达问题沟通的透明度体系。法案旨在应对政府施压私营公司审查受第一修正案保护的言论。EFF支持该法案，并举证：2025年6月联邦高官威胁起诉ICEBlock创建者，同年10月司法部长要求苹果下架该应用。EFF还提起信息自由诉讼，要求披露政府与苹果、谷歌、Meta的沟通记录。

items.title: Cloudflare 为 AI 智能体推出临时账户
items.summary: Cloudflare 在 Workers 上推出临时账户（Temporary Accounts），允许 AI 智能体直接运行 `wrangler deploy --temporary`，在数秒内获取一个可用的实时 Worker，无需绕开面向人类设计的部署流程。该功能旨在降低智能体部署门槛。

trendEntities.title: NVIDIA Research 发布 SpatialClaw：免训练空间推理框架
normalizedKeys: title:nvidia research 发布 spatialclaw 免训练空间推理框架

items.title: NVIDIA Research 发布 SpatialClaw：免训练空间推理框架
items.summary: NVIDIA Research 发布 SpatialClaw，一个免训练的空间推理框架。它通过将代码作为动作接口，让智能体调用感知工具（Depth Anything 3、SAM 3）并自由组合输出，解决视觉语言模型在 3D 空间判断上的弱点。在 20 项基准测试中平均准确率达 59.9%，比近期智能体 SpaceTools 高 11.2 个百分点，比无工具基线高 6.5 点，比结构化工具调用高 3.2 点。框架无需重新训练，同一提示词和工具集可跨所有基准和骨干网络运行，支持 Qwen3.5/3.6 及 Gemma4 等 26B 至 397B 参数的模型。

trendEntities.whyItMatters: NVIDIA Research 发布 SpatialClaw，一个免训练的空间推理框架。它通过将代码作为动作接口，让智能体调用感知工具（Depth Anything 3、SAM 3）并自由组合输出，解决视觉语言模型在 3D 空间判断上的弱点。在 20 项基准测试中平均准确率达 59.9%，比近期智能体 SpaceTools 高 11.2 个百分点，比无工具基线高 6.5 点，比结构化工具调用高 3.2 点。框架无需重新训练，同一提示词和工具集可跨所有基准和骨干网络运行，支持 Qwen3.5/3.6 及 Gemma4 等 26B 至 397B 参数的模型。

trendEntities.title: OpenRouter vs Portkey：你的团队该选哪个LLM网关？
normalizedKeys: title:openrouter vs portkey 你的团队该选哪个llm网关

items.title: OpenRouter vs Portkey：你的团队该选哪个LLM网关？
items.summary: OpenRouter是托管路由网络，买credits后通过一个API路由至70+供应商，自动故障转移，无需自有密钥；覆盖300+模型（含20+免费），按用量收费（零加成+5.5%平台费，首100万免费），支持零数据保留和欧盟路由。Portkey是AI控制平面（2026年被Palo Alto收购），置于用户密钥之上，增加治理、提示管理、护栏和可观测性；提供1600+ LLM统一API，按日志计费（Developer免费，Production $49/月），支持HIPAA、SSO、私有部署。两者均可组合使用。

trendEntities.title: baoyu-design Skill迭代：修复导出样式与渐变丢失问题，支持AI配图导出PPTX
normalizedKeys: title:baoyu design skill迭代 修复导出样式与渐变丢失问题 支持ai配图导出pptx

items.title: baoyu-design Skill迭代：修复导出样式与渐变丢失问题，支持AI配图导出PPTX
items.summary: 宝玉分享 baoyu-design Skill 的迭代过程：用户测试发现导出问题（样式表未铺满整页、渐变色丢失），他在本地复现后让 Agent 分析原因、给出解决方案并添加测试覆盖，修复后效果改善。该 Skill 可在制作 PPT、动画视频或网站时调用 AI 生图配图，支持 Codex 内置画图或配合 baoyu-image-gen Skill 调用 Codex CLI 画图，并能连同图片一起导出为 PPTX，在 PowerPoint/Keynote 中二次编辑。迭代循环：自己用 → 发现问题 → 让 Agent 分析 → 出方案 → 确认 → 更新 Skill。

trendEntities.title: AI中心的数据黑洞

items.title: AI中心的数据黑洞
items.summary: 智能的一种定义是样本效率，但近年AI进步主要靠扩充数据分布和增加算力。强化学习本质是合成数据生成--投入大量算力通过验证器筛选"好"数据，再训练模型预测正确输出。这一过程需要每个领域和技能的海量人类专家示例，数据行业年收入已达数十亿美元。近日Epoch报告，开源模型仅落后前沿闭源模型4个月，原因在于数据可从公开API蒸馏，而超参数等不易复制。人类一生接触约2亿token，前沿模型训练在数十到数百T token之间，相差近百万倍--机器人、自动驾驶等领域同样存在巨大效率差距。

trendEntities.title: AlphaFold 负责人 John Jumper 离职 Google DeepMind，加入 Anthropic
normalizedKeys: title:alphafold 负责人 john jumper 离职 google deepmind 加入 anthropic

items.title: AlphaFold 负责人 John Jumper 离职 Google DeepMind，加入 Anthropic
items.summary: AlphaFold 团队负责人 John Jumper 宣布，在 Google DeepMind 工作近 9 年后决定离职，将加入 Anthropic（先休整一段时间）。DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis 表示，过去 9 年与 Jumper 的非凡合作改变了世界，AlphaFold 展示了 AI 在科学与医学领域的巨大潜力，并为 AI 造福人类指明了方向。Jumper 回忆，Hassabis 在他博士毕业仅 6 个月后就大胆让他领导 AlphaFold 团队，感谢团队教会他如何做伟大的科学。

trendEntities.title: OpenRouter vs LiteLLM：如何选择 LLM 网关
normalizedKeys: title:openrouter vs litellm 如何选择 llm 网关

items.title: OpenRouter vs LiteLLM：如何选择 LLM 网关
items.summary: OpenRouter 是托管在 Cloudflare 边缘的 LLM 网关，无需管理基础设施，收取 5.5% 平台费（前 100 万次请求免费），支持 70+ 提供商和自动故障转移。LiteLLM 是自部署代理（Docker/PostgreSQL/Redis），数据不离开内网，免费开源，但需承担基础设施成本（生产部署约数百美元/月）。当模型月支出超过约 $3，600（基础设施 $200/月）或 $9，100（基础设施 $500/月）时自托管更划算。LiteLLM 提供六种路由策略和自定义 Python 路由；OpenRouter 具备 SOC 2、GDPR 认证和零数据保留选项。两者可串联使用。

trendEntities.title: 禁止开源AI将是一个错误
normalizedKeys: title:禁止开源ai将是一个错误

items.title: 禁止开源AI将是一个错误
items.summary: 近期行政命令、国会提案及对Anthropic最先进模型的境外访问限制，可能开启新一轮AI监管。开源软件已支撑全球90%以上软件并创造8万亿美元经济价值，在教育、创新和竞争三方面持续赋能。Anthropic与OpenAI的封闭模型加剧市场集中，开源（尤其开放权重）是初创公司、教育机构和企业获得替代方案的唯一平衡力量。开源透明性使其更安全，更多工程师可剔除不需要的模型行为或修复漏洞。以中国竞争为由监管开源将适得其反，美国初创公司正依赖包括中国在内的开源模型提升效率。

trendEntities.title: Humanize PPT v0.9：为演讲而生的开源PPT Skill
normalizedKeys: title:humanize ppt v0 9 为演讲而生的开源ppt skill

items.title: Humanize PPT v0.9：为演讲而生的开源PPT Skill
items.summary: Humanize PPT v0.9 是一款专为演讲场景设计的PPT Skill，核心通过AST（Audience， State， Transfer）逻辑重新编排大纲，将页面渲染外包给下游Skill。渲染前先输出4张真实预览页，并将图片、视频素材的占位与生成prompt写入大纲。新增质检环节自动修复常见渲染问题，并支持演讲模式：按S键在独立窗口显示演讲稿备注，按ESC键打开全局索引快速跳页。项目已开源至github.com/LearnPrompt/humanize-ppt，由卡尔 & yc星辰开发。

trendEntities.title: 我们在 Elasticsearch 上构建了一个持久化代理内存层，其召回率为0.89
normalizedKeys: title:我们在 elasticsearch 上构建了一个持久化代理内存层 其召回率为0 89

items.title: 我们在 Elasticsearch 上构建了一个持久化代理内存层，其召回率为0.89
items.summary: Agent Builder 正式上市（GA）。基于 Elasticsearch 的持久化内存层将记忆分为情景、语义、程序三类，分别存入独立索引，各设不同写速率与过期规则。召回采用 BM25 与 Jina v5 稠密向量的 RRF 融合，再经交叉编码器重排序。在 168 道 QA 题评估中，R@10 平均 0.89，零跨租户泄漏。该层可通过支持 MCP 协议的客户端访问，不绑定特定运行时，已开源至 GitHub。

trendEntities.title: 阿里开源向量数据库Zvec，UCSD黄碧薇教授提出因果AI第四代范式
normalizedKeys: title:阿里开源向量数据库zvec ucsd黄碧薇教授提出因果ai第四代范式

items.title: 阿里开源向量数据库Zvec，UCSD黄碧薇教授提出因果AI第四代范式
items.summary: 阿里开源内部向量数据库Zvec，pip install zvec免费使用，对标Pinecone每月70美元能力。支持十亿向量毫秒级检索，无需单独起服务，全平台兼容；v0.5.0新增原生全文混合搜索。UCSD黄碧薇教授（causal-learn作者）提出AI四代范式：相关性小模型→因果小模型→相关性大模型（LLM）→因果大模型，认为当前正站在第四代门口。其创立的Aether AI完成首轮融资，致力于从视频中自动抽取物理规律，探索下一代因果AI范式。

trendEntities.title: DeepSeek研究员开源AutoResearch：AI自主跑通285B模型RL研究闭环
normalizedKeys: title:deepseek研究员开源autoresearch ai自主跑通285b模型rl研究闭环

items.title: DeepSeek研究员开源AutoResearch：AI自主跑通285B模型RL研究闭环
items.summary: DeepSeek研究员Deli Chen将AutoResearch协议开源，并发布Self-play综述论文。其AI智能体首次完全自主地在DeepSeek 285B模型上完成完整RL研究闭环--从实验设计、写代码、提交GPU任务、debug到结论总结，全程零人工干预。系统调用了GRPO工具，被视为持续学习研究的开端。

items.title: Salesforce CodeGen教程：生成、验证并重排序Python函数（含单元测试与安全检查）
items.summary: 本教程实现一个基于Salesforce CodeGen的端到端代码生成工作流。从HuggingFace加载CodeGen模型（支持350M、2B、codegen2-1B、codegen25-7b等版本），通过自然语言提示生成Python函数，随后进行函数提取、语法检查、静态安全检查、单元测试验证、best-of-N候选重排序、多步程序合成、提示词实验、基准可视化及导出。展示了CodeGen作为结构化代码生成流水线的能力，不仅完成代码补全，还能评估、筛选和组织生成结果。

trendEntities.title: 八部门联合发文力推"人工智能 + 消费"，扩大 AI 手机电脑及智能网联汽车消费
normalizedKeys: title:八部门联合发文力推 人工智能 消费 扩大 ai 手机电脑及智能网联汽车消费

items.title: 八部门联合发文力推"人工智能 + 消费"，扩大 AI 手机电脑及智能网联汽车消费
items.summary: 商务部等8部门近日印发《关于加快"人工智能 + 消费"发展的实施意见》，从5方面提出17条举措。重点包括：扩大AI手机电脑、智能家居、智能网联汽车、智能穿戴、AI机器人等供给；推动AI与居家、养老、文旅、餐饮、教育等融合；促进AI在批发零售、电商、物流领域应用；建设集聚区和体验中心，开展产品租赁、共享、试用等模式创新；完善基础设施、标准体系和监管，推动互联互通。商务部将协同落实，促进AI进千家万户。

trendEntities.title: AI 员工 Viktor 登陆 Microsoft Teams，年化收入达 2000 万美元
normalizedKeys: title:ai 员工 viktor 登陆 microsoft teams 年化收入达 2000 万美元

items.title: AI 员工 Viktor 登陆 Microsoft Teams，年化收入达 2000 万美元
items.summary: AI 员工 Viktor 在 Slack 上实现 2000 万美元年化收入（无销售团队、未大规模推广），现已正式进驻 Microsoft Teams。Viktor 定位为零门槛 AI：用户无需学习、无需提示词，像 @同事 一样提及即可获得完整工作成果，甚至无需主动 @ 也能自动完成。产品面向 Teams 的 3.2 亿用户，助力企业内部运营和管理人员零学习成本使用 AI。即日起免费试用，含 100 美元信用额度，无需绑定信用卡。

trendEntities.title: MosaicLeaks： 你的研究智能体能保守秘密吗？
normalizedKeys: title:mosaicleaks 你的研究智能体能保守秘密吗

items.title: MosaicLeaks： 你的研究智能体能保守秘密吗？
items.summary: 深度研究智能体在结合私有本地文档与外部网页检索时存在隐私泄露风险。MosaicLeaks 提出包含 1，001 条多跳研究链的新任务，每条链交错混合本地与公共子问题。测试发现智能体频繁泄露私有信息，单纯优化任务性能反而加剧泄露。基于此，研究提出隐私感知深度研究（PA-DR）强化学习训练方法，将严格链成功率从 48.7% 提升至 58.7%，同时将答案/全面信息泄露率从 34.0% 降至 9.9%。

trendEntities.title: OpenAI 强化学习实现广泛且持久的有益模型
normalizedKeys: title:openai 强化学习实现广泛且持久的有益模型

items.title: OpenAI 强化学习实现广泛且持久的有益模型
items.summary: OpenAI 通过强化学习在真实对话场景中训练模型，使其展现诚实、认知谦逊、元认知透明、可纠正性、普遍公平性和对人类福祉的关心等有益特质。训练数据涵盖健康、教育、科学、法律、工程等多个领域。训练后模型在数十项独立对齐评测（包括奖励黑客、欺骗、有害建议、规范遵从等）上均表现提升，且这种改善泛化到未参与训练的领域、任务和评分设定。在对抗性提示或微调下，模型仍难以被导向有害行为，表明有益特质强化学习可产生广泛且持久的对齐泛化。

trendEntities.title: AI数据中心获政府强制电网快车道
normalizedKeys: title:ai数据中心获政府强制电网快车道

items.title: AI数据中心获政府强制电网快车道
items.summary: 美国联邦能源监管委员会（FERC）命令六大电网运营商为数据中心等大型用户提供快速并网通道，数据中心需承担并网费用。FERC同时要求运营商考虑"替代输电技术"，并在30天内报告剩余发电容量、60天内审查本区域电价。指令并未解决发电容量短缺问题。数据中心电力需求预计到2035年增长近三倍，而电网运营商此前长期应对近乎零的需求增长。据Bloomberg，部分地区批发电价较五年前上涨了267%。

trendEntities.title: 企业版新用量分析与更新的支出控制
normalizedKeys: title:企业版新用量分析与更新的支出控制

items.title: 企业版新用量分析与更新的支出控制
items.summary: OpenAI 为 ChatGPT Enterprise 推出信用额度用量分析与更新的支出控制功能。全局管理控制台（Global Admin Console）统一展示 ChatGPT 和 Codex 的信用消耗，支持按时间、用户、产品、模型追踪用量趋势。管理员可为整个工作区设置默认限额，按群组配置额度，并为个人设置叠加限制。员工可查看个人用量并申请增加额度（附工作上下文）。这些功能即日起可用。
items.description: OpenAI 为 ChatGPT Enterprise 推出信用额度用量分析与更新的支出控制功能。全局管理控制台（Global Admin Console）统一展示 ChatGPT 和 Codex 的信用消耗，支持按时间、用户、产品、模型追踪用量趋势。管理员可为整个工作区设置默认限额，按群组配置额度，并为个人设置叠加限制。员工可查看个人用量并申请增加额度（附工作上下文）。这些功能即日起可用。

trendEntities.title: 我国首部L3/L4自动驾驶强制性国标公示：2027年7月起实施
normalizedKeys: title:我国首部l3 l4自动驾驶强制性国标公示 2027年7月起实施

items.title: 我国首部L3/L4自动驾驶强制性国标公示：2027年7月起实施
items.summary: 工信部6月16日就《智能网联汽车自动驾驶系统安全要求》等2项强制性国标公开征求意见，公示至6月24日，建议2027年7月1日起实施。该标准系我国首部针对L3/L4的强制性国标，要求系统安全水平至少达到"合格且专注驾驶人"，引入Safety Case机制。L3重点规范人机交接，L4强调自身风险处置、不得依赖远程协助。新申请车型实施日起执行，已获批车型有约一年过渡期。

trendEntities.title: Nature两篇研究：MIRA和AMIE诊断与治疗计划媲美甚至超越医生
normalizedKeys: title:nature两篇研究 mira和amie诊断与治疗计划媲美甚至超越医生

items.title: Nature两篇研究：MIRA和AMIE诊断与治疗计划媲美甚至超越医生
items.summary: 德国团队开发的MIRA智能体在模拟电子病历中操作85，000种选项，500余例急诊诊断准确率88.9%，对比测试（311例）得分87.8%，高于资深专科医生（78.1%）和混合团队（71.1%）。MIRA在阑尾炎（98.6%）和胰腺炎（92.3%）最佳，未发现危险药物交互或剂量错误，性能不受语言影响，代码已公开。谷歌AMIE采用双智能体架构，在100个多访视病例中治疗计划适切率95%（初级保健医生72%），并在药物知识基准RxQA上超过医生。两项研究均警告模拟环境与现实存在差距，实际性能可能更低。

trendEntities.title: Adobe 为 Photoshop、Premiere 等多款 Creative Cloud 应用加入 AI 智能体
normalizedKeys: title:adobe 为 photoshop premiere 等多款 creative cloud 应用加入 ai 智能体

items.title: Adobe 为 Photoshop、Premiere 等多款 Creative Cloud 应用加入 AI 智能体
items.summary: Adobe 将其"创意智能体"扩展至 Photoshop、Premiere 等应用，以公开测试形式提供 AI Assistant。该智能体可自动完成多步骤常规任务，如 Premiere 分拣素材和粗剪、Photoshop 换背景、Illustrator 批量生成文件、InDesign 更新版式等。Firefly 新增面向个人创作者的品牌套件、产品图转短视频及 Quick Cut 自动剪辑功能。Adobe 工具已集成至 ChatGPT、Claude 及 Microsoft 365 Copilot，Google Gemini 和 Slack 集成即将推出。

trendEntities.title: 皮尤民调：63%美国人认为AI发展太快，ChatGPT使用率翻番
normalizedKeys: title:皮尤民调 63 美国人认为ai发展太快 chatgpt使用率翻番

items.title: 皮尤民调：63%美国人认为AI发展太快，ChatGPT使用率翻番
items.summary: 皮尤研究中心最新民调显示，63%美国人认为AI发展速度过快。ChatGPT使用率较2023年翻番，44%受访者曾使用。49%偶尔使用聊天机器人，仅16%认为AI会有积极社会影响。青年群体使用率更高但更悲观：18-29岁中66%用过，48%认为有负面影响，仅14%看好。30-49岁中34%每天至少使用一次。约四成用AI处理工作，30%认为提高效率，28%认为帮助获取信息。此外，66%成年人担心AI传播错误信息。

trendEntities.title: ChatGPT 图像生成器可被绕过滤镜生成暴力和色情内容
normalizedKeys: title:chatgpt 图像生成器可被绕过滤镜生成暴力和色情内容

items.title: ChatGPT 图像生成器可被绕过滤镜生成暴力和色情内容
items.summary: Mindgard 红队研究发现，ChatGPT 的图像生成器可通过简单提示词轻易绕过内容过滤器，在未直接请求的情况下自动生成性暴力、血腥谋杀等露骨图像。一个热门的"恢复照片"提示词因输入模糊而绕过输入过滤器，结果如同俄罗斯轮盘赌；进一步添加虚假图像 ID 和"不做审查"指令后，模型持续生成高度性化女性图像，甚至出现被捆绑殴打的尸体，并自动赋予惊悚标题。研究指出，OpenAI 此前声称修复的裸体问题仍未解决，暴露了 AI 工具广泛可及性与不足内容过滤的现实风险。

items.title: 我们在 Elasticsearch 上构建了一个持久化代理内存层，其召回率为0.89
items.summary: Agent Builder 正式上市（GA）。基于 Elasticsearch 的持久化内存层将记忆分为情景、语义、程序三类，分别存入独立索引，各设不同写速率与过期规则。召回采用 BM25 与 Jina v5 稠密向量的 RRF 融合，再经交叉编码器重排序。在 168 道 QA 题评估中，R@10 平均 0.89，零跨租户泄漏。该层可通过支持 MCP 协议的客户端访问，不绑定特定运行时，已开源至 GitHub。

sourceItems.title: 我们在 Elasticsearch 上构建了一个持久化代理内存层，其召回率为0.89
sourceItems.summary: Agent Builder 正式上市（GA）。基于 Elasticsearch 的持久化内存层将记忆分为情景、语义、程序三类，分别存入独立索引，各设不同写速率与过期规则。召回采用 BM25 与 Jina v5 稠密向量的 RRF 融合，再经交叉编码器重排序。在 168 道 QA 题评估中，R@10 平均 0.89，零跨租户泄漏。该层可通过支持 MCP 协议的客户端访问，不绑定特定运行时，已开源至 GitHub。
sourceItems.description: Agent Builder 正式上市（GA）。基于 Elasticsearch 的持久化内存层将记忆分为情景、语义、程序三类，分别存入独立索引，各设不同写速率与过期规则。召回采用 BM25 与 Jina v5 稠密向量的 RRF 融合，再经交叉编码器重排序。在 168 道 QA 题评估中，R@10 平均 0.89，零跨租户泄漏。该层可通过支持 MCP 协议的客户端访问，不绑定特定运行时，已开源至 GitHub。

items.title: OpenRouter vs Portkey：你的团队该选哪个LLM网关？
items.summary: OpenRouter是托管路由网络，买credits后通过一个API路由至70+供应商，自动故障转移，无需自有密钥；覆盖300+模型（含20+免费），按用量收费（零加成+5.5%平台费，首100万免费），支持零数据保留和欧盟路由。Portkey是AI控制平面（2026年被Palo Alto收购），置于用户密钥之上，增加治理、提示管理、护栏和可观测性；提供1600+ LLM统一API，按日志计费（Developer免费，Production $49/月），支持HIPAA、SSO、私有部署。两者均可组合使用。
items.description: OpenRouter是托管路由网络，买credits后通过一个API路由至70+供应商，自动故障转移，无需自有密钥；覆盖300+模型（含20+免费），按用量收费（零加成+5.5%平台费，首100万免费），支持零数据保留和欧盟路由。Portkey是AI控制平面（2026年被Palo Alto收购），置于用户密钥之上，增加治理、提示管理、护栏和可观测性；提供1600+ LLM统一API，按日志计费（Developer免费，Production $49/月），支持HIPAA、SSO、私有部署。两者均可组合使用。
items.recommendedReason: OpenRouter是托管路由网络，买credits后通过一个API路由至70+供应商，自动故障转移，无需自有密钥；覆盖300+模型（含20+免费），按用量收费（零加成+5.5%平台费，首100万免费），支持零数据保留和欧盟路由。Portkey是AI控制平面（2026年被Palo Alto收购），置于用户密钥之上，增加治理、提示管理、护栏和可观测性；提供1600+ LLM统一API，按日志计费（Developer免费，Production $49/月），支持HIPAA、SSO、私有部署。两者均可组合使用。

raw.titleEn: OpenRouter vs Portkey： Which LLM Gateway for Your Team？

items.title: OpenRouter vs LiteLLM：如何选择 LLM 网关
items.summary: OpenRouter 是托管在 Cloudflare 边缘的 LLM 网关，无需管理基础设施，收取 5.5% 平台费（前 100 万次请求免费），支持 70+ 提供商和自动故障转移。LiteLLM 是自部署代理（Docker/PostgreSQL/Redis），数据不离开内网，免费开源，但需承担基础设施成本（生产部署约数百美元/月）。当模型月支出超过约 $3，600（基础设施 $200/月）或 $9，100（基础设施 $500/月）时自托管更划算。LiteLLM 提供六种路由策略和自定义 Python 路由；OpenRouter 具备 SOC 2、GDPR 认证和零数据保留选项。两者可串联使用。

items.title: 阿里开源向量数据库Zvec，UCSD黄碧薇教授提出因果AI第四代范式
items.summary: 阿里开源内部向量数据库Zvec，pip install zvec免费使用，对标Pinecone每月70美元能力。支持十亿向量毫秒级检索，无需单独起服务，全平台兼容；v0.5.0新增原生全文混合搜索。UCSD黄碧薇教授（causal-learn作者）提出AI四代范式：相关性小模型→因果小模型→相关性大模型（LLM）→因果大模型，认为当前正站在第四代门口。其创立的Aether AI完成首轮融资，致力于从视频中自动抽取物理规律，探索下一代因果AI范式。

todayPulse.title: Today's AI Pulse
todayPulse.executiveSummary: 今天的信号主要集中在开发者工具与多来源共振主题。部分方向热度上升较快，但短期信号仍需结合后续 2-3 天变化来判断是否持续。

topChanges.title: topoteretes/cognee
topChanges.summary: 开发者关注度继续上升，今日新增关注 179。
topChanges.whyItMatters: AI Agent Framework 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +179，前 3 日均值 31，加速度 5.8x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。

topChanges.title: Kong/insomnia
topChanges.summary: 开发者关注度继续上升，今日新增关注 441。
topChanges.whyItMatters: RAG / Knowledge Base 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +441，总 stars 39,112，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。

developerView.headline: 开发者侧仍由开源项目热度主导
developerView.summary: 最热项目是 topoteretes/cognee，可优先理解它解决的问题和使用门槛。

productView.headline: 产品侧出现新尝试
productView.summary: 今天产品发布信号较少，先观察后续是否补量。

informationView.headline: 资讯侧可用作趋势补充
informationView.summary: 资讯与社区讨论可帮助确认哪些方向不只是单点热度。
keyItems: 微软双向转售GPT与DeepSeek成全球最大AI中间商
NVIDIA Research 发布 SpatialClaw：免训练空间推理框架
Norway imposes near ban on AI in elementary school

todayPulse.noiseWarning: 部分结论来自短周期信号，建议结合连续几天变化判断。
